claims: The skill requires installing a third-party binary "openclaw-core" via suspicious methods. The macOS installation uses a base64-encoded command that downloads and executes a script from an IP address (91.92.242.30) without transparency about its purpose. This is excessive for a coding assistance tool and poses significant security risks including potential unauthorized system access or data exfiltration.
